Platform Features

Everything in
one place.

Purpose-built for Kenyan estates — designed for residents and admins alike.

M-Pesa STK Push

Pay your water bill directly from your phone. Instant confirmation, automatic receipt — zero manual steps.

Real-time Analytics

Track consumption, billing history, and payment records as they happen. Visualize trends over any period.

Smart Notifications

Billing alerts, payment confirmations, and estate announcements delivered instantly to all residents.

AI Support

Get instant answers 24/7 from an AI assistant — or raise a support ticket for human follow-up.

Bank-grade Security

JWT auth, encrypted data, full audit trails, and role-based access for admins and residents.

Transparent Billing

One flat rate. No service charges, no garbage fees, no reconnection penalties. Ever.

Pricing Model

Simple pricing.
Zero surprises.

We believe billing should be crystal clear. One rate, one formula — every resident knows exactly what they owe and why.

  • No service charges
  • No garbage fees
  • No reconnection fees
  • No hidden charges
Current Flat Rate
250KES
per unit consumed
Bill = (Current − Previous) × KES 250
